title: Venezuelan Bean Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup originating from Venezuela, made with a variety of ingredients and spices.

ingredients.name: Bitter leafy greens
ingredients.notes: such as kale or collard greens

instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Venezuelan bean soup mix and cook according to package instructions.
Add the diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, and bitter leafy greens.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the crumbly cheese until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional bitter leafy greens if desired.
